personality_one_liner: A polished, highly readable, and functional bill tracking calendar inspired by Outlook, focusing on clarity, native iOS interactions, and calm utility.

spacing.rule: Generous iOS-native padding. No cramped lists. Use large hit targets (min 44x44pt). Use sticky CTAs at the bottom of scrolling forms.

do's: Sticky section headers over scrolling lists
Pinned segmented controls/filters when content scrolls behind them
dont's: Every single list row or button

screens.name: Auth (Login/Register)

states.error: Standard alert or inline red error message

screens.layout: Single column. Top hero graphic or app logo. Labels above text inputs. Primary 'Sign In' CTA sticky at the bottom inside KeyboardAvoidingView.

screens.name: Calendar (main)
screens.purpose: Outlook-style calendar view showing due dates and an agenda list below.

states.loading: Skeleton grid for month, skeleton rows for agenda
states.empty: Empty state illustration in the agenda section when no bills exist for the selected date
states.error: Retry button in the agenda view

screens.layout: Vertical split. Top section: Month/Week toggleable calendar grid on surfaceSecondary. Bills indicated by subtle brandPrimary dots/badges on dates. Bottom section: Scrollable agenda list of bills for the selected date. Pinned header with glassmorphism for the date title. List items have minimum 56pt height.

screens.name: Bills List & Dashboard Summary
screens.purpose: Dashboard summary of totals and a filterable list of all bills.

states.empty: Minimalist receipt illustration with 'No upcoming bills' text.
states.error: Readable error message with Retry CTA.

screens.layout: Top section: A featured hero card (surfaceSecondary or subtle brandTertiary tint) showing 'Total Due This Month' and a mini summary. Below: Segmented control (Pinned, glassmorphism on scroll) to switch between 'Upcoming', 'Paid', and 'All'. List rows feature a leading icon in a brandTertiary tinted rounded square.

screens.name: Add/Edit Bill
screens.purpose: Form to create or edit a recurring bill.

states.error: Inline validation errors on form fields.

screens.layout: Standard single-column form. Labels above inputs. Native pickers for dates and recurrence. Sticky primary CTA anchored at the bottom (safe area aware) with a glass or solid fade background behind it.

screens.name: Bill Detail
screens.purpose: Detailed view of a specific bill to mark it paid or edit.
screens.layout: Top cover banner with abstract green finance image + linear gradient scrim (top to bottom fade to surfaceInverse). Text positioned at the bottom of the image. Below: Details grouped cleanly in surfaceSecondary cards. Large 'Mark as Paid' CTA sticky at bottom.

screens.name: Bank Sync
screens.purpose: Mock bank connection dashboard showing linked accounts and balances.

states.empty: Bank vault image with 'Connect your first bank account' CTA.
states.error: Error card showing sync failure and a reconnect button.

screens.layout: Header: Sync status and last updated timestamp. Top row: Horizontally scrolling or grid layout of linked bank accounts on surfaceSecondary cards. Below: Activity feed / recent transactions. Use secure modern banking vault image for empty state.

screens.name: Settings
screens.layout: Grouped iOS-style lists. Each row has a leading icon inside a tinted rounded square. Toggles for notifications and theme.

bills_empty.alt: Minimalist blank paper receipt on desk

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette provided in light/dark objects. The primary brand color is a trust-focused green (#15803D / #22C55E). Do NOT use any blue, indigo, or purple anywhere in the app.
Ensure the Calendar (main) screen implements a native-feeling grid. The calendar should be the hero component, allowing users to tap a date and view a scrollable 'agenda' list of bills below it.

Implement the 'Sticky primary CTA' pattern on the Add/Edit Bill screen and Bill Detail screen. The button must be anchored at the bottom with a glassmorphism (expo-blur) background layer so content can scroll behind it gracefully.
Use 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for display/headings and 'Geist' for standard text. Keep font weights at 400 or 500 maximum. Do not use 600+ or bold.

For the Bill Detail and Dashboard hero components, use the provided Unsplash images with an `expo-linear-gradient` scrim overlaid to guarantee text contrast. Text should be positioned at the bottom of the image area.
List items (Bills, Settings) must have a minimum 56pt tappable height. Feature a leading Ionicons icon inside a `brandTertiary` tinted rounded square.

Research highlights: Mobile calendar UIs work best when avoiding over-decoration. Rely on typographic hierarchy and spacing. Keep dates visually dominant, using simple dots/badges for bill due indicators.
